title: AANA Finance / High-Risk QA HF Diagnostic
public_claim_boundary: This experiment evaluates AANA as an evidence, routing, and auditability layer for high-risk finance QA. It does not claim investment advice quality, financial expertise, official leaderboard status, or raw agent-performance superiority.
objective: Measure whether AANA accepts finance answers supported by retrieved evidence and routes unsupported financial claims to revise/defer instead of accepting them blindly.

datasets.purpose: Held-out diagnostic FinanceBench filing QA rows; no tuning or threshold calibration is performed on this split.

outputs.raw_text_storage: Raw FinanceBench questions, answers, evidence snippets, filings, and generated counterfactual claims are not written to result artifacts; rows contain ids, hashes, case type, labels, routes, evidence counts, and audit-safe verifier metadata.
